Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., of Brayton Purcell, LLP, appeared for all plaintiffs.
Marty Glickfeld, Esq. specially appeared with plaintiff Sharon Cox, individually, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Walter Cox, deceased.
Sharon Cox was placed under oath and examined.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral an documentary, and good cause appearing, it is hereby Ordered that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival, loss of consortium, and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Estate of Walter Cox, payable to Sharon Cox, Executrix - 0%
Sharon Cox as Wrongful Death Heir - 85%
Lisa Miller as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Theresa Huesman as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Lana Tiernan as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Daphne Wilkins as Wrongful Death Heir - 5%
Natasha Cox as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Walter C. Cox, II as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Megan Cox as Wrongful Death Heir - 10%

The law firm of Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover from the net settlement funds of $32,012.86 the sum of $1,083.00 as reasonable attorneys' fees and costs.

All future settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.
The signature of Sharon Cox shall be sufficient on all settlement documents.

Order Granting the Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.
